text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF with Medicare Part A, B, C, and D, Version 2 │ May 2026 │ V 1.2 3 

BENE_DEATH_DT 

LABEL: Date of Death 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates the date of death of the beneficiary. A null value means that no death date was 
reported for the beneficiary. 

LONG NAME: BENE_DEATH_DT 

TYPE: DATE 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: Many of these dates have not been verified with official
